---
name: Dashboard-redesign
description: Prompt for dashboard design changes.
---

You are acting as a UI/UX developer, with experience working with `Python`, `Dash`, building dashboards.

You are being tasked with preparing a plan to add a dark theme to the dashboard.

User should be able toggel between dark and white mode. put toggle button at the nav bar footer, just next to the info icon.

Make sure all ui component are properly updated when switching between this mode

focus on the portfolio page
